LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays ticket counts for New, Open, and Waiting statuses with polling and drill-down.

property.name: newThreshold
property.label: New Tickets Threshold
property.description: Color changes if count exceeds this number.

property.name: openThreshold
property.label: Open Tickets Threshold
property.description: Color changes if count exceeds this number.

property.name: waitingThreshold
property.label: Waiting Tickets Threshold
property.description: Color changes if count exceeds this number.

property.name: holdThreshold
property.label: On Hold Tickets Threshold
property.description: Color changes if count exceeds this number.

property.name: columnFields
property.label: Drill-down Columns
property.description: Comma-separated list of Case field API names to show in the modal.

property.name: extraExportFields
property.label: Additional Export Fields
property.description: Comma-separated list of additional fields available for selection in the export popup.

property.name: defaultSortField
property.label: Default Sort Field
property.description: API Name of the field to sort by initially.

property.name: pollingFrequency
property.label: Polling Frequency (seconds)
property.description: How often the counts should refresh. Minimum 5 seconds.

property.name: thresholdColor
property.label: Alert Color
property.description: Hex code for the alert color (e.g., #ff0000).

property.name: normalColor
property.label: Normal Color
property.description: Hex code for the normal color (e.g., #000000).
